headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Citizens Financial Group, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Manan Gosalia   maintains Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $73 to $80.

headline: 3 Reasons to Sell CFG and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Citizens Financial Group has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 9.2%. The stock now trades at $60.28, marking a 16.8% gain. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
